item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Scattershot 3 I grow tired of the same sets of media.
item.description:
I saw a movie the other night where the cast actually acted *human*. One character lost focus and almost got his boss killed and aside from some initial adrenaline induced frustration, his boss confided that he understood, because the guy is apparently going through something traumatic and not able to be at his best. Thats how humans treat each other, not as caricatures, but as people. It was *refreshing*. Anyway, hopefully my group is gonna get back into the old Dungeons/Dragons/Diners/Dives/Discos/DanceOffs soon. That'll help a lot. I miss making campaigns.
Quacks!
I am exhausted seeing shows and games that look like copies of other shows and games and generic schlock thrown out by people who blatantly are ripping off clearly successful great ideas. Like, I saw a game that looked like a worse-made Ark. Ark didn't even look great when it came out, and this looked worse and looked like it played worse and was made 10 years later. What the fuck are you doing, generic game developer? Ark still exists, and people still play it. Nobody is going to play your game in any serious numbers (I feel very strongly it was a cheap rip off to edge into a market for as little effort as possible, but maybe it was someone's passion project and if so, I am sorry. It really didn't look like it.) I get that it's financially scary making something new, but we need to look past money and budgets and let people with vision have some real goram control over their projects again. Let them have the reigns, and let one guy on the team act as his foil, with no executive control but also who is not fireable, who's job it is to nitpick and act as a voice of reason against unnecessarily bombastic grand vision without reasonable method. A rudder for the ship, so to speak. Let's get big swings at new stories with writers who have passion and team member's who's job it is to read is and to say "sorry but that is terrible and doesnt make sense and ya fucked up your own established lore!" Rather than yes-men and underpaid interns idiotproofing for AI dialogue. There isnt a AAA developer or big Hollywood studio who cant afford to do all this right and pay everyone fair wages if they just eat the cost off the top 10% of their earners salaries (that's an irritated, educated estimate. Eat the fucking rich). Bring us back quality. Oh and while we're at it, if we find you run or are affiliated with any top-market company and you are taking any action to buy, starve, strangle, cut-out, shut-out, blacklist, or impede any non top-market company from any progress in any field, I hope you get jailed and your company dismantled and it's resources allocated to the other companies in your field. That's all! There's *two* archives now! NSFW eromemes: https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG SFW all the rest: https://imgur.com/a/JU64V6n May your way be Green and Golden! Edit: the movie is called Outbreak (made in 2024)
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Trauma Sutra
item.dc:creator: fallibledegenerate

item.title: A perfect summary
item.description: Fp Edit : don't have much to say, it's been a rough few days dealing with people here. Seems like a few people are starting to realize that they have voted for a felon, pedophile, adulterer, and so much more. Well, as we predicted this Administration is tyrannical. As I continue to cover the abhorrent Behavior for many aligned with were part of this Administration. I want to remind everybody that we were warned about this for years. Of course I'm angry at the people who support this administration. But I'm almost more upset and disgusted with the people who had the ability to vote that abstained. Overall I'm just disgusted with this country more than I ever was.

item.title: Good news everyone
item.description:
#good_news https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/asher-waktins-gore-death-buffalo-south-africa-b2803065.html
Wait he was tracking a buffalo and the same buffalo turned around to fuck him up? LMAO Someone give that buffalo a peace prize. Also, I love the 35 MPH detail.
Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes. I am in some kind of mood today so a different version of me is using Imgur. Some people are concerned that I am being an insensitive asshole by laughing at this man’s death. I completely understand your concerns, and I will not be taking any corrective actions to address those concerns. I don’t have sympathy for a well deserved death. Original post: How is this a sport? How is this hunting? $10k to shoot an animal seems like a top tier dickhead move. This has to be an AI assisted article: “Cape buffalo are large, heavy-cow like animals….” I don’t know about you guys but reading about douche canoes like this dead “hunter” is catharsis for me. This is a good morning after all!

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1435 (bomesmasher the grand)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Didn't get the outdoor education job. But the person did give me a list of links to find similar jobs so... yay?
I miss the taste of grapefruit. If citrus meads tasted good (I hear they're problematic), I'd probably make one based on grapefruit called "Contraindicated by medication" or "Neurotypical"
Napoleon actually did these things, incidentally.
Scenes from an alternative universe.
Hahahahahaha
Still waiting on hearing about two more winery tasting room positions, and the barista position. If I get rejected from those... its going to be Sunk Cost Fallacy time and I'm going to start applying to jobs in Tuscon and Maryland so I can enhance my rejection list.
It was. It worked... sorta. Romantic love did not find me, but i have gained the love of friends, and that's fantastic.
Me waking up at four am to fill out job applications because "fuck it, I didn't die in my sleep, so I might as well."
He's not carrying me well. My feet are dragging in the dirt, and it's painful rn not gonna lie.
.... fuck.
My dream job right now is just sit in the woods dressed as a wizard counting birds and maybe handling them. I wish I could find a bird observatory with a banding research program, but my banding license is long (20 years) expired so I wouldn't be competitive I'm afraid.
***dissassociation time***
This would be an issue.
I came not to bring peace, but a sword. Also, I bring fun facts about a whole variety of topics.
....yeah. i assume my interest is unwanted and unwarranted, so I keep my yap shut.
Biiiiirrrrbs.
Pew pew pew
Slay, queen!
I do wish I could get a job so I could get that sword.. I could get it with the check I got for the totaled car, but thats also three months rent in that check, so im not comfortable doing that without income at minimum equal to my rent.
... i kinda feel like @walpurrga would rock this.
It was broken, but there wasn't much that could be done about it after centuries of civil wars and especially, massive plagues.
Bonesmasher the Grand as a tiny pterosaur has BIG "Princess Monster Truck the Lovebird" energy; and my friend Kayla's lovebird is named that.
Quack. I want to see shorebirds. I have a craving for watching ungainly awkward black-necked stilts. And then also Phalaropes doing whirlygigs.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin, seemingly directed to a Cardinal outside: [taps glass] "Pippin! Step up! Whatchoodoing? [Taps glass] i love you too I love you too I love you [taps glass] beep Glory to Pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #188
item.description: Today showed the systematic rewiring of the government into a weapon. They’re disappearing the Constitution from official websites, deploying the National Guard to forcibly take DNA from detained migrants, and forcing FEMA disaster-relief employees to become deportation agents or lose their jobs. They want you to get tired and look away. We have to see it all. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/dem-hotel-bomb-threat 2. https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-increases-go-live 3. https://go.govbrief.today/brazil-tariff-wto-help 4. https://go.govbrief.today/witkoff-meets-with-putin 5. https://go.govbrief.today/us-human-rights-criticism 6. https://go.govbrief.today/epidemiologist-warning-fall-vaccines 7. https://go.govbrief.today/nasa-shutting-two-missions 8. https://go.govbrief.today/nws-hiring-hundreds-more 9. https://go.govbrief.today/idaho-wind-farm-canceled 10. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-declassified-cia-document 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pressure-apple-invests 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-dc-national-guard 13. https://go.govbrief.today/pro-bono-attorney-sanction 14. https://go.govbrief.today/temporary-staty-humanities-grants 15. https://go.govbrief.today/federal-court-system-hacked 16. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-waives-age-limit 17. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-employees-reassigned-ice 18. https://go.govbrief.today/national-guard-processing-detainees 19. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-penske-rental-truck 20. https://go.govbrief.today/new-ice-facility-indiana 21. https://go.govbrief.today/ucla-grants-584m 22. https://go.govbrief.today/va-ends-collective-bargaining 23. https://go.govbrief.today/digital-constitution-edited 24. https://go.govbrief.today/openai-federal-nominal-price 25. https://go.govbrief.today/confederate-statue-cost-10m Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/intellectually-disabled-man-executed Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/firm-helps-trump-targets Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
